creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
The major function of Yt is visualizing data: "an open-source, permissively-licensed python package for analyzing and visualizing volumetric data" http://yt-project.org/

The domains include astrophysics, seismology, nuclear engineering, molecular dynamics, and oceanography.

It has been for astrophysics only, but it evolved and branched into the other areas. So the only unifying basis now is math in my understanding.
